hero_subtitle: SFTY connects provider outputs into one operational layer that reduces manual handoffs, preserves audit evidence, and supports smoother compliance workflows for digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance workflows depend on manual transfers between disconnected provider outputs and teams, creating delays and duplicated effort. This fragmentation weakens traceability and complicates audit readiness for compliance officers and operations staff.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates disparate provider checks, manual reviews, decision logs and evidence into a single workflow enabling compliance teams to reduce handoffs, improve traceability and maintain a consistent audit trail.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY organizes fragmented provider results through rules, manual reviews, case creation, decision logging and evidence preservation into a controlled compliance workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented handoffs. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases and evidence to reduce manual compliance handoffs and improve operational control for VASPs.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY enables regulated VASPs to reduce manual handoffs by connecting provider outputs into audit-ready workflows supporting bank due diligence and controlled deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case workflows connect provider outputs and reviews
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how SFTY preserves audit evidence across compliance tools

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance operations?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a connected compliance control layer that connects fragmented provider outputs into structured workflows, cases, decision logs and reports for regulated digital asset operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY reduce manual handoffs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY consolidates checks, alerts and data from multiple providers into one operational workflow, reducing manual reviews, duplicated efforts and handoffs between compliance teams and tools.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence to enable auditable compliance records, supporting clear traceability for internal reviews and external audits.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing providers, connecting KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening outputs into one integrated compliance stack without disrupting current tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our current providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC, KYB, KYT or Travel Rule providers but turns their outputs into coordinated workflows, evidence and regulatory reports.
final_title: Reduce manual handoffs with connected workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider outputs into controlled workflows that preserve evidence and support operational compliance for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
